english_text: I loved you from the start
Even if you push me away
I'll wait as long as it takes
My heart hurts because of you
I'll protect you no matter what
If only I met you sooner
I was always looking at you
Every moment with you is precious
I fell for you without realizing
I'll love you until the end
I want to wake up next to you
Being apart from you is painful
I'm not letting you go this time
My love for you won't change
You taught me what love is
Every day with you is a gift
I knew it was you from the moment I saw you
You make me want to be better
korean_text: 너 때문에 더 좋은 사람이 되고 싶어
romanization: neo ttaemune deo joeun sarami doego sipeo

english_text: I'm only happy when I'm with you
Our love was meant to be
I dream of you every night
Hold me and don't let go
I want to be the reason you smile

romanization: nae simjangeun neoreul wihae ttwi eo

english_text: I promise to love only you
I loved you yesterday and today and tomorrow
My heart is full because of you
I was born to love you
You are the love of my life
